where.if: AND ( sp.SALES_PROD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR sp.SALES_PROD_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT sp.SALES_PROD_ID, sp.SALES_PROD_CODE, sp.SALES_PROD_NAME,
sp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME,
sp.LIST_PRICE, CAST(sp.COST_PRICE AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS COST_PRICE, sp.VAT_RATE, CAST(sp.LIST_PRICE * sp.VAT_RATE / 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS VAT_AMOUNT,
sp.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, sp.SALE_STATUS_CD, sp.SALE_START_DT, sp.SALE_END_DT,
sp.VIEW_CNT, sp.SUMMARY, sp.MD_COMMENT,
sp.DETAIL_HTML, sp.PAYMENT_INFO, sp.DELIVERY_INFO, sp.RETURN_INFO, sp.REFUND_INFO,
sp.USE_YN, sp.DEL_YN,
sp.REG_ID, sp.REG_DT, sp.MOD_ID, sp.MOD_DT FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT sp LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON sp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY sp.SALES_PROD_ID DESC
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT sp.SALES_PROD_ID, sp.SALES_PROD_CODE, sp.SALES_PROD_NAME,
sp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME,
sp.DETAIL_HTML, sp.PAYMENT_INFO, sp.DELIVERY_INFO, sp.RETURN_INFO, sp.REFUND_INFO,
sp.LIST_PRICE, CAST(sp.COST_PRICE AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS COST_PRICE, sp.VAT_RATE, CAST(sp.LIST_PRICE * sp.VAT_RATE / 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS VAT_AMOUNT,
sp.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, sp.SALE_STATUS_CD, sp.SALE_START_DT, sp.SALE_END_DT,
sp.VIEW_CNT, sp.SUMMARY, sp.MD_COMMENT,
sp.DETAIL_HTML, sp.PAYMENT_INFO, sp.DELIVERY_INFO, sp.RETURN_INFO, sp.REFUND_INFO,
sp.USE_YN, sp.DEL_YN,
sp.REG_ID, sp.REG_DT, sp.MOD_ID, sp.MOD_DT FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT sp LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON sp.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_DETAIL spd ON sp.SALES_PROD_ID = spd.SALES_PROD_ID AND spd.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE sp.SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} AND sp.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT ( SALES_PROD_CODE, SALES_PROD_NAME, SELLER_MEMBER_ID,
LIST_PRICE, COST_PRICE, VAT_RATE,
EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, SALE_STATUS_CD, SALE_START_DT, SALE_END_DT,
VIEW_CNT, SUMMARY, MD_COMMENT,
DETAIL_HTML, PAYMENT_INFO, DELIVERY_INFO, RETURN_INFO, REFUND_INFO,
USE_YN, DEL_YN,
REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES (
#{salesProdCode}
CONCAT('SP', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), LPAD(FLOOR(RAND()*1000), 3, '0'))
, #{salesProdName}, #{sellerMemberId},
#{listPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{vatRate},
COALESCE(#{exposureStatusCd}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{saleStatusCd}, 'LIVE'), #{saleStartDt}, #{saleEndDt},
0, #{summary}, #{mdComment},
#{detailHtml}, #{paymentInfo}, #{deliveryInfo}, #{returnInfo}, #{refundInfo},
#{useYn}, 'N',
#{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT SET SALES_PROD_NAME = #{salesProdName}, SELLER_MEMBER_ID = #{sellerMemberId},
LIST_PRICE = #{listPrice}, COST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_RATE = #{vatRate},
EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD = COALESCE(#{exposureStatusCd}, 'Y'), SALE_STATUS_CD = COALESCE(#{saleStatusCd}, 'LIVE'), SALE_START_DT = #{saleStartDt}, SALE_END_DT = #{saleEndDt},
SUMMARY = #{summary}, MD_COMMENT = #{mdComment},
DETAIL_HTML = #{detailHtml}, PAYMENT_INFO = #{paymentInfo}, DELIVERY_INFO = #{deliveryInfo}, RETURN_INFO = #{returnInfo}, REFUND_INFO = #{refundInfo},
USE_YN = #{useYn},
MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{salesProdId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_DETAIL ( SALES_PROD_ID, DETAIL_HTML, PAYMENT_INFO, DELIVERY_INFO, RETURN_INFO, REFUND_INFO,
USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{salesProdId}, #{detailHtml}, #{paymentInfo}, #{deliveryInfo}, #{returnInfo}, #{refundInfo},
COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), 'N', COALESCE(NULLIF(#{regId}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{modId}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{regId}, ''), 'SYSTEM')), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DETAIL_HTML = VALUES(DETAIL_HTML), PAYMENT_INFO = VALUES(PAYMENT_INFO), DELIVERY_INFO = VALUES(DELIVERY_INFO), RETURN_INFO = VALUES(RETURN_INFO), REFUND_INFO = VALUES(REFUND_INFO), USE_YN = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(USE_YN), ''), 'Y'), DEL_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = VALUES(MOD_ID), MOD_DT = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{value}
UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT SET VIEW_CNT = COALESCE(VIEW_CNT, 0) + 1, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
